strategy.primaryFocus: Founder-led SaaS SEO blog operations with email-native workflows and direct publishing
strategy.positioningThesis: Build a content ecosystem around founder-led SaaS SEO blog operations emphasizing Tavyn's email-native workflow, founder perspective integration, and seamless publishing to GitHub and Next.js sites. Prioritize educational content on workflow simplification, approval processes, and technical publishing to differentiate from generic AI writing tools and agency complexity.
strategy.recommendedFirstPost: How Founder-Led SaaS Teams Can Build a Consistent SEO Blog Workflow Without Managing Complex Tools
topicsToPrioritize: How founder-led SaaS teams can build consistent SEO blog workflows
Creating SEO content plans with founder input before writing
Publishing SEO blogs directly to Next.js and GitHub sites
Email-based approval workflows for SEO content
Avoiding generic AI content: integrating founder perspective
topicsToAvoidOrDelay: Generic AI blog writing tool comparisons
Broad SEO strategy not tailored to SaaS or founders
Agency service promotion without workflow focus
